description: Your rocketry team is preparing for a Critical Design Review (CDR). Using the 'A simple model rocket' design, apply the team's visual branding by setting the Nose cone to Red, the Body tube to Blue, and the Trapezoidal fin set to Yellow. Ensure at least one flight simulation is up-to-date. Export a 'Design report' to /home/ga/Documents/exports/design_report.pdf, a 'Fin alignment guide' to /home/ga/Documents/exports/fin_alignment_guide.pdf, and save the modified rocket design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/cdr_rocket.ork.
